'''masoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coagglutinin|coagglutinin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coagglutinin|coagglutinin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| masoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæsereth|mæsereth]] || [[word:mæserej|mæserej]] || [[word:mæseresh|mæseresh]] || [[word:mæsere|mæsere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:masosoroth|masosoroth]] || [[word:masosoroj|masosoroj]] || [[word:masosorosh|masosorosh]] || [[word:masosoro|masosoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:masoroth|masoroth]] || [[word:masoroj|masoroj]] || [[word:masorosh|masorosh]] || [[word:masoro|masoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:masofroth|masofroth]] || [[word:masofroj|masofroj]] || [[word:masofrosh|masofrosh]] || [[word:masofrof|masofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:masorotho|masorotho]] || [[word:masorojo|masorojo]] || [[word:masorosho|masorosho]] || [[word:masoroko|masoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:masoroth|masoroth]] || [[word:masoroj|masoroj]] || [[word:masorosh|masorosh]] || [[word:masoro|masoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:masorothol|masorothol]] || [[word:masorojol|masorojol]] || [[word:masoroshol|masoroshol]] || [[word:masorokol|masorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:masorothotho|masorothotho]] || [[word:masorojojo|masorojojo]] || [[word:masoroshosho|masoroshosho]] || [[word:masoroko|masoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:masorothon|masorothon]] || [[word:masorojon|masorojon]] || [[word:masoroshon|masoroshon]] || [[word:masorokon|masorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:masorothoro|masorothoro]] || [[word:masorojoro|masorojoro]] || [[word:masoroshoro|masoroshoro]] || [[word:masorokoro|masorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
